top_family_sizes.template: with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, a.headquarter_state, p.line_of_business, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) as net_paid, sum(p.risk_score * es.earned_premium) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as premium_weighted_risk_score from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id and date_trunc('<literal>', c.loss_date)::date = es.snapshot_month left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>, <int>) select month_start, headquarter_state, line_of_business, earned_premium, net_paid, net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) as paid_loss_ratio, premium_weighted_risk_score, avg(net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>)) over (partition by headquarter_state, line_of_business order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as moving_average_loss_ratio_3m from monthly where earned_premium >= <int> and net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) > <num> order by month_start, paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, a.headquarter_state, p.line_of_business, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) as net_paid, sum(p.risk_score * es.earned_premium) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as premium_weighted_risk_score from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id and date_trunc('<literal>', c.loss_date)::date = es.snapshot_month left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>, <int>) select month_start, headquarter_state, line_of_business, earned_premium, net_paid, net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) as paid_loss_ratio, premium_weighted_risk_score, avg(net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>)) over (partition by headquarter_state, line_of_business order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as moving_average_loss_ratio_6m from monthly where earned_premium >= <int> and net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) > <num> order by month_start, paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, a.headquarter_state, p.line_of_business, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) as net_paid, sum(p.risk_score * es.earned_premium) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as premium_weighted_risk_score from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id and date_trunc('<literal>', c.loss_date)::date = es.snapshot_month left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>, <int>) select month_start, headquarter_state, line_of_business, earned_premium, net_paid, net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) as paid_loss_ratio, premium_weighted_risk_score, avg(net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>)) over (partition by headquarter_state, line_of_business order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as moving_average_loss_ratio_9m from monthly where earned_premium >= <int> and net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) > <num> order by month_start, paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, a.headquarter_state, p.line_of_business, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) as net_paid, sum(p.risk_score * es.earned_premium) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as premium_weighted_risk_score from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id and date_trunc('<literal>', c.loss_date)::date = es.snapshot_month left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>, <int>) select month_start, headquarter_state, line_of_business, earned_premium, net_paid, net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) as paid_loss_ratio, premium_weighted_risk_score, avg(net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>)) over (partition by headquarter_state, line_of_business order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as moving_average_loss_ratio_12m from monthly where earned_premium >= <int> and net_paid / nullif(earned_premium, <int>) > <num> order by month_start, paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select a.account_id, a.account_name, a.headquarter_state, p.policy_number, p.written_premium, e.employee_name as underwriter_name, b.broker_name from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' order by a.account_name, p.policy_number;

select al.state_code, cov.coverage_type, sum(es.earned_premium) / nullif(sum(es.earned_exposure_units), <int>) as exposure_weighted_rate_per_unit, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(es.earned_exposure_units) as earned_exposure_units from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join account_locations al on al.account_id = a.account_id where cov.coverage_type = '<literal>' and al.state_code = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by al.state_code, cov.coverage_type having sum(es.earned_exposure_units) > <int> order by exposure_weighted_rate_per_unit desc;

select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, p.written_premium, coalesce(sum(pt.written_premium_delta), <int>) as transaction_written_premium, p.written_premium - coalesce(sum(pt.written_premium_delta), <int>) as unreconciled_amount from policies p left join premium_transactions pt on pt.policy_id = p.policy_id and pt.transaction_date <= date '<literal>' where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and p.effective_date <= date '<literal>' and p.expiration_date > date '<literal>' group by p.policy_id, p.policy_number, p.written_premium having abs(p.written_premium - coalesce(sum(pt.written_premium_delta), <int>)) > <num> order by abs(p.written_premium - coalesce(sum(pt.written_premium_delta), <int>)) desc;

select ia.asset_id, ia.asset_type, ia.asset_value, al.state_code, a.account_name, p.policy_number, cov.coverage_type, cov.coverage_limit, es.snapshot_month, es.exposure_amount from insured_assets ia join account_locations al on al.location_id = ia.location_id join accounts a on a.account_id = al.account_id join policies p on p.account_id = a.account_id join coverages cov on cov.policy_id = p.policy_id join exposure_snapshots es on es.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id where ia.asset_type = '<literal>' and al.state_code = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' order by ia.asset_value desc, ia.asset_id;

select c.claim_id, c.claim_number, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.loss_date, c.reported_date, c.claim_status, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) as net_paid_amount, coalesce(max(crs.case_reserve + crs.ibnr_reserve), <int>) as latest_reserve, coalesce(sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount), <int>) + coalesce(max(crs.case_reserve + crs.ibnr_reserve), <int>) as incurred_amount, c.reported_date - c.loss_date as report_lag_days from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id left join claim_reserve_snapshots crs on crs.claim_id = c.claim_id where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and c.cause_of_loss = '<literal>' and c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by c.claim_id, c.claim_number, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.loss_date, c.reported_date, c.claim_status order by incurred_amount desc, c.claim_id;

select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;

select rc.treaty_type, p.line_of_business, sum(cr.ceded_paid_amount) as ceded_paid_amount, sum(cr.ceded_reserve_amount) as ceded_reserve_amount, sum(cr.ceded_paid_amount + cr.ceded_reserve_amount) as total_ceded_incurred from claim_reinsurance cr join claims c on c.claim_id = cr.claim_id join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join reinsurance_layers rl on rl.reinsurance_layer_id = cr.reinsurance_layer_id join reinsurance_contracts rc on rc.reinsurance_contract_id = rl.reinsurance_contract_id where rc.treaty_type = '<literal>' and p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and cr.valuation_month >= date '<literal>' and cr.valuation_month < date '<literal>' group by rc.treaty_type, p.line_of_business order by total_ceded_incurred desc;

select a.headquarter_state, count(*) filter (where c.claim_status <> '<literal>') as metric_value from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state order by metric_value desc nulls last;

select a.headquarter_state, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as metric_value from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state order by metric_value desc nulls last;

select a.headquarter_state, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as metric_value from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state order by metric_value desc nulls last;

select a.headquarter_state, count(*) filter (where c.initial_case_reserve >= <int>) as metric_value from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where a.headquarter_state = '<literal>' and c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state order by metric_value desc nulls last;

select p.line_of_business as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select ca.carrier_name as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by ca.carrier_name having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select b.broker_tier as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by b.broker_tier having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select pr.license_state as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by pr.license_state having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select a.headquarter_state as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select a.industry_code as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by a.industry_code having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select r.region_name as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join teams t on t.team_id = e.team_id join branches br on br.branch_id = t.branch_id join regions r on r.region_id = br.region_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by r.region_name having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select br.branch_name as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join teams t on t.team_id = e.team_id join branches br on br.branch_id = t.branch_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by br.branch_name having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

select e.role_title as segment, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) as net_paid, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium, sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) as paid_loss_ratio from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join claims c on c.coverage_id = cov.coverage_id left join claim_payments cp on cp.claim_id = c.claim_id and cp.payment_month = es.snapshot_month where es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by e.role_title having sum(cp.paid_amount - cp.recovery_amount) / nullif(sum(es.earned_premium), <int>) > <num> order by paid_loss_ratio desc nulls last;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, b.broker_name, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>), scored as (select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, sum(earned_premium) over (partition by broker_name order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as trailing_3m_earned_premium from monthly) select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, trailing_3m_earned_premium, rank() over (partition by month_start order by trailing_3m_earned_premium desc nulls last) as broker_rank from scored order by month_start, broker_rank, broker_name;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, b.broker_name, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>), scored as (select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, sum(earned_premium) over (partition by broker_name order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as trailing_6m_earned_premium from monthly) select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, trailing_6m_earned_premium, rank() over (partition by month_start order by trailing_6m_earned_premium desc nulls last) as broker_rank from scored order by month_start, broker_rank, broker_name;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, b.broker_name, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>), scored as (select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, sum(earned_premium) over (partition by broker_name order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as trailing_9m_earned_premium from monthly) select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, trailing_9m_earned_premium, rank() over (partition by month_start order by trailing_9m_earned_premium desc nulls last) as broker_rank from scored order by month_start, broker_rank, broker_name;

with monthly as (select date_trunc('<literal>', es.snapshot_month)::date as month_start, b.broker_name, sum(es.earned_premium) as earned_premium from exposure_snapshots es join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = es.coverage_id join policies p on p.policy_id = cov.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where p.line_of_business = '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month >= date '<literal>' and es.snapshot_month < date '<literal>' group by <int>, <int>), scored as (select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, sum(earned_premium) over (partition by broker_name order by month_start rows between <int> preceding and current row) as trailing_12m_earned_premium from monthly) select month_start, broker_name, earned_premium, trailing_12m_earned_premium, rank() over (partition by month_start order by trailing_12m_earned_premium desc nulls last) as broker_rank from scored order by month_start, broker_rank, broker_name;

select p.line_of_business as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select p.policy_status as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select ca.carrier_name as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by ca.carrier_name order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select b.broker_tier as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by b.broker_tier order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select pr.license_state as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by pr.license_state order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select a.headquarter_state as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.headquarter_state order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select a.industry_code as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by a.industry_code order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select r.region_name as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join teams t on t.team_id = e.team_id join branches br on br.branch_id = t.branch_id join regions r on r.region_id = br.region_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by r.region_name order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select br.branch_name as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join teams t on t.team_id = e.team_id join branches br on br.branch_id = t.branch_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by br.branch_name order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select e.role_title as segment, count(*) as claim_count, avg(c.reported_date - c.loss_date) as average_report_lag_days, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>) as late_reported_claims, count(*) filter (where c.reported_date - c.loss_date > <int>)::numeric / nullif(count(*), <int>) as late_reported_rate from claims c join policies p on p.policy_id = c.policy_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id where c.loss_date >= date '<literal>' and c.loss_date < date '<literal>' group by e.role_title order by late_reported_rate desc nulls last, claim_count desc;

select p.line_of_business as line_of_business, sum(p.written_premium) as total_written_premium from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by total_written_premium desc nulls last;

select p.line_of_business as line_of_business, avg(p.risk_score) as average_risk_score from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by average_risk_score desc nulls last;

select p.line_of_business as line_of_business, count(*) as policy_count from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by policy_count desc nulls last;

select p.line_of_business as line_of_business, avg(p.retention_ratio) as average_retention_ratio from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by average_retention_ratio desc nulls last;

select p.line_of_business as line_of_business, sum(p.written_premium * p.commission_rate) as commission_dollars from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.line_of_business order by commission_dollars desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as policy_status, sum(p.written_premium) as total_written_premium from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by total_written_premium desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as policy_status, avg(p.risk_score) as average_risk_score from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by average_risk_score desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as policy_status, count(*) as policy_count from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by policy_count desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as policy_status, avg(p.retention_ratio) as average_retention_ratio from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by average_retention_ratio desc nulls last;

select p.policy_status as policy_status, sum(p.written_premium * p.commission_rate) as commission_dollars from policies p where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by p.policy_status order by commission_dollars desc nulls last;

select ca.carrier_name as carrier, sum(p.written_premium) as total_written_premium from policies p join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.effective_date >= date '<literal>' and p.effective_date < date '<literal>' group by ca.carrier_name order by total_written_premium desc nulls last;
